---
title: "PFAS_prob"
output: html_document
---

Met oude code proberen

```{r initiate warnings=FALSE, message=FALSE}
check_and_install <- function(package) {
  tryCatch({
    # Load the package
    library(package, character.only = TRUE)
    message(paste("Package", package, "is already installed and loaded."))
  }, error = function(e) {
    # If an error occurs, install the package
    message(paste("Package", package, "is not installed. Installing now..."))
    install.packages(package, dependencies = TRUE)
    library(package, character.only = TRUE)
    message(paste("Package", package, "has been successfully installed and loaded."))
  })
}

# Install the required packages
check_and_install("patchwork")
check_and_install("ggplot2")
check_and_install("tidyverse")
check_and_install("constants")
check_and_install("deSolve")
check_and_install("knitr")
check_and_install("dplyr")
check_and_install("zyp")
check_and_install("slider")
check_and_install("readxl")
check_and_install("Kendall")
check_and_install("ggpubr")
check_and_install("ncdf4")
check_and_install("raster")
check_and_install("sf")
check_and_install("exactextractr")
check_and_install("here")
check_and_install("reshape2")
check_and_install("scales")
check_and_install("readxl")
check_and_install("dplyr")
check_and_install("stringr")
check_and_install("dplyr")
check_and_install("here")
check_and_install("lhs")
check_and_install("tidyverse")
check_and_install("treemapify")
check_and_install("gridExtra")
library(RColorBrewer)

```

```{r rekenen, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
## Loop om per PFAS resultaat te krijgen:
## Resultaat: dataframe met aantal jaren tot X% verwijdering, gevisualiseerd in een violin plots
## Functies:  initiate() start wereld en past wereld aan voor modelstudie
##            sb_emission_df() maakt emissie dataframe met scenario uit studie Joris Meesters
##

#Input
start_year = 2020                     #Start jaartal
EmissionDuration <- 5                #Aantal jaar met emissies
runtime <- 80 + EmissionDuration     #Looptijd van het model
#runtime <- 20 + EmissionDuration
end_year = start_year + runtime       #Eind jaartal
tmax <- runtime*365.25*24*60*60       #Eind in seconden
nTIMES <- runtime+1                   #Number of timesteps, e.g. yearly, 2-year
ReductionDuration <- 15
Wereldwijd = TRUE 
nruns <- 75 #jq ~ 1000  runs

#Gekozen PFAS-stof namen en scenarios van Joris Meesters
stoffen <- c("Perfluorobutane_sulfonic", "Perfluorobutanoic", 
                      "Perfluoropentanoic", "Perfluoroheptanoic", 
                      "Perfluorooctanoic", "Trifluoroacetic", "Perfluorohexanoic")
mapping <-  c("Perfluorobutane_sulfonic" = "PFBS", "Perfluorobutanoic" = "PFBA", 
              "Perfluoropentanoic" = "PFPeA", "Perfluoroheptanoic" = "PFHpA", 
              "Perfluorooctanoic" = "PFOA", "Trifluoroacetic" = "TFA", 
              "Perfluorohexanoic" = "PFHxA")

#ReductionDuration, TotalReduction, ReductionSteps, ReductionFractions, PlotTitle
scenarios <- list(list(15, 100, 15, 'equal', "1) Volledig reduceren van emissies"), 
               list(15, 95, 15, 'equal', "2) REACH restrictie"), 
               list(20, 95, 20, c(rep(0.05, times=10), rep(0.045, times=10)), "3) REACH restrictie met derogaties"))#,
               #list('-', 0, 0, 0, "4) Geen restricties"))
scenarios <- list(
               list(15, 96, 15, 'equal', "1) Volledig implementatie restricties"), 
               list(22, 83, 22, c(rep(0.03846154, times=13), 0.03666667, times=9), "2) Restrictie met derogaties"),
               list(33, 96, 33, c(rep(0.15, times=2), rep(0.01538462, times=13), rep(0.0255556, times=18)), "3) Extra Rijn scenario 30% reductie")
                ) #sb heeft tijdsstap 1 jaar dus 18 maanden?

data_list = list()
barplot_list = list()
emissie_plots = list()
for (catchment in c("Maas", "Rijn")) {
  
  #Resultaten dataframe
  data <- expand.grid(
    run = seq(nruns),
    verwijdering = c("99.9% verwijdering", "95% verwijdering", "75% verwijdering", "50% verwijdering"),
    scenario = unlist(lapply(scenarios, function(x) x[[5]])),
    stof = stoffen
    )
  waardes <- c()
  #Loop door stoffen, start SB-wereld, Loop door scenario's, per scenario resultaten berekenen.
  for (index in seq_len(length(stoffen))) {
    substance = stoffen[index]
    print(substance)
    #Start Wereld
    source('baseScripts/initWorld.R')
    if(catchment == "Rijn"){ 
      source("AdjustModelRhine.R")
    } else if (catchment == "Maas") {
      source("AdjustModelMeuse.R")
    }
    source("EmissionFunction.R")
    
    # spreiding in variabele
    if (is.numeric(nruns)) {
      path = "/rivm/n/jansont/Documents/Werk - Lokaal/SimpleBox PFAS/Uncertainty/uncertain_variables.xlsx"
      # path = "/rivm/n/jansont/Documents/Werk - Lokaal/SimpleBox PFAS/Uncertainty/Example_uncertain_variables (3).xlsx"
      Example_vars <- head(readxl::read_xlsx(path, sheet = "Variable_data"), 12)
      #Example_vars[4, "SubCompart"] =  'Water'
      print(paste0("onzekerheid toevoegen bij: ", unique(Example_vars$varName)))
      varFuns <- World$makeInvFuns(Example_vars)
      Correlations <- readxl::read_xlsx(path, sheet = "Correlation")
      
    }
    
    #Loop door Joris Meesters emissie scenario's
    for (scenario in scenarios) {
      print(scenario[[5]])
      #scenario = scenarios[[2]]
      World$NewSolver("DynamicSolver")
      
      #Gebruik EmissionFunction om Emissie dataframe te maken
      result = sb_emission_df(GlobalEmission = 457.2, SelectScales=c("A", "M", "T", "R", "C"),
                              time_steps= nTIMES, EmissionDuration = EmissionDuration, start_year = start_year, 
                              TotalRuntime = runtime,ReductionDuration = scenario[[1]], TotalReduction = scenario[[2]], 
                              ReductionSteps =scenario[[3]], StepDuration = 'equal', ReductionFractions = scenario[[4]], 
                              PlotTitle = scenario[[5]], number_runs=nruns)
      
      #emissie_plots[[length(emissie_plots) + 1]] <- result$plot_25j
      
      
      #Solve
      emissions = result$emissions
      tmax <- max(unique(emissions$Time))
      tmin <- min(unique(emissions$Time))
      if (is.numeric(nruns)) {
        World$Solve(emissions = emissions, 
            var_box_df = Example_vars, 
            var_invFun = varFuns, 
            nRUNs = length(unique(emissions$RUN)), 
            tmin = tmin,
            tmax = tmax, 
            nTIMES = nTIMES,
            correlations = Correlations)
      } else if (!is.numeric(nruns)) {
        World$Solve(emissions = emissions,
                    tmax=tmax,
                    nTIMES = nTIMES)
      }
      
      # kMatrix <- World$K_matrix() 
      # all_ks <- sapply(kMatrix, function(mat) mat['w1RU', 'w1CU'])
      # volume = World$fetchData("Volume") %>% 
      #   filter(Scale == 'Continental', SubCompart == 'river') %>%
      #   summarise(volume = sum(Volume, na.rm = TRUE)) %>% pull(volume)
      # discharges <- all_ks * volume
      
      concentration_data <- World$Concentration() 
      # solution = World$Masses()
      # emission = World$Emissions()
      # variable_values = World$VariableValues()

      # Check verdeling flows:
      # Kaas = World$kaas %>%
      #   filter(fromSubCompart == 'river', process=='k_Advection', fromScale=='Continental', toScale=='Regional') %>%
      #   pull(k)
      
      
      # area <- World$fetchData("TotalArea") %>%
      #   filter(Scale == 'Continental') %>%
      #   pull(TotalArea)
      # 
      # discharge_hand <- Kaas * volume
      
      # print(World$fetchData("x_ContRiver2Reg"))
      # print(World$fetchData("x_RiverDischarge"))
      
      #Bereken voor Regional River hoe lang het duurt tot de concentratie X% lager is
      subcompart = 'w1'
      concentration_data <- concentration_data %>%
          filter(grepl("R", Abbr) & grepl(subcompart, Abbr)) %>%
          mutate(year = floor(start_year + as.numeric(time) / 31557600))
      
      
      last_high <- mean(concentration_data[concentration_data$year == start_year +EmissionDuration, ]$Concentration)
      #Bepaal thresholds
      concentratie_thresholds <- c(
        threshold_concentratie_50 = last_high * 0.5, 
        threshold_concentratie_75 = last_high * 0.25,
        threshold_concentratie_95 = last_high * 0.05,
        threshold_concentratie_99 = last_high * 0.01 #99.9%
        )
      
      #Filter de concentratie data op thresholds
      x50 <- concentration_data %>%
        filter(Concentration < (concentratie_thresholds[1])) %>%
        filter(year > (start_year + EmissionDuration)) %>%
        group_by(RUNs) %>%
        slice_min(order_by = year, n = 1) %>%     
        ungroup() %>%
        dplyr::select(RUNs, year, Concentration)  
      x75 <- concentration_data %>%
        filter(Concentration < (concentratie_thresholds[2])) %>%
        filter(year > (start_year + EmissionDuration)) %>%
        group_by(RUNs) %>%
        slice_min(order_by = year, n = 1) %>%     
        ungroup() %>%
        dplyr::select(RUNs, year, Concentration)  
      x95 <- concentration_data %>%
        filter(Concentration < (concentratie_thresholds[3])) %>%
        filter(year > (start_year + EmissionDuration)) %>%
        group_by(RUNs) %>%
        slice_min(order_by = year, n = 1) %>%     
        ungroup() %>%
        dplyr::select(RUNs, year, Concentration)  
      x99 <- concentration_data %>%
        filter(Concentration < (concentratie_thresholds[4])) %>%
        filter(year > (start_year + EmissionDuration)) %>%
        group_by(RUNs) %>%
        slice_min(order_by = year, n = 1) %>%     
        ungroup() %>%
        dplyr::select(RUNs, year, Concentration)  
      
      pad_series <- function(series, nruns) {
        if (length(series) == 0) {
          # If the series is empty, return a vector of NAs of max_length
          return(rep(NA, nruns))
        } else {
          # Otherwise, pad with NAs to reach max_length
          return(c(series, rep(NA, nruns - length(series))))
        }
      }
      waardes <- c(waardes,pad_series(x99$year, nruns) - (start_year+EmissionDuration))
      waardes <- c(waardes,pad_series(x95$year, nruns) - (start_year+EmissionDuration))
      waardes <- c(waardes,pad_series(x75$year, nruns) - (start_year+EmissionDuration))
      waardes <- c(waardes,pad_series(x50$year, nruns) - (start_year+EmissionDuration))
      
    }
  }
  write.csv(data, "~/my_scratch_dir/output23012026.csv")
  #voeg toe aan resultaten dataframe
  data$waarde <- waardes
  data$afkorting <- mapping[data$stof]
  mapping_procent <- c("99.9% verwijdering" = "-99.9%", "95% verwijdering" = "-95%", "75% verwijdering" = "-75%", "50% verwijdering" = "-50%")
  data$kort_procent <- mapping_procent[data$verwijdering]
  
  ## Plot stof op een as
  violin_colors <- c(
  "-99.9%" = "#A6CEE3",
  "-95%"   = "#B2DF8A",
  "-75%"   = "#FB9A99",
  "-50%"   = "#FDBF6F"
  )
  mean_colors <- c(
    "-99.9%" = "#1F78B4",
    "-95%"   = "#33A02C",
    "-75%"   = "#E31A1C",
    "-50%"   = "#FF7F00"
  )
  subset1 <- data[data$scenario==scenarios[[1]][[5]], ]
  p1 <- ggplot(data, aes(x = afkorting, y = waarde, fill = kort_procent)) +
          geom_violin(alpha = 0.5, position = "identity", scale="width") +
          stat_summary(
            aes(color = kort_procent, color=kort_procent),
            fun = mean,
            geom = "point",
            position = position_identity(),
            size = 3,
            shape=21,
            stroke=1.2
          ) +
          coord_flip() +
          scale_fill_manual(values = violin_colors) +
          scale_color_manual(values = mean_colors) +
          scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 60)) +
          labs(
            title = "Aantal jaren tot 99.9, 95, 75 & 50% reductie in concentraties - Rijn",
            x = "",
            y = "Jaren",
            fill = "Reductie",   # <-- legend title for fill
            color = "Reductie"   # <-- legend title for color
          ) +
          theme_linedraw() +
          facet_wrap(~ scenario, nrow=1)
  
  
}


```

```{r fig.height=15, fig.width=20}
p1 + theme(
  plot.title = element_text(size=18, face="bold"),
  strip.text = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),     # Facet labels
  axis.title.x = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),   # X axis title
  axis.title.y = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),   # Y axis title
  axis.text.x  = element_text(size = 12),                  # X axis tick labels
  axis.text.y  = element_text(size = 12),                  # Y axis tick labels
  legend.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),   # Legend title
  legend.text  = element_text(size = 12)                   # Legend labels
)
ggsave("onzeker_violin_a4.png", plot = p1, width = 297, height = 210, units = "mm", dpi = 300)
```


```{r overig}
scenario_cols <- names(waardes)[str_detect(names(waardes), "REACH restrictie met derogaties")]

long_data <- waardes %>%
  dplyr::select(id, scenario_cols) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -id,
    names_to = "variable",
    values_to = "value"
  )  %>%
  group_by(variable) %>%
  summarise(
    mean = mean(value, na.rm=TRUE),
    sd = sd(value, na.rm=TRUE)
  )


%>%
  mutate(
    substance = str_extract(variable, "PFBS|PFBA|PFPeA|PFHpA|PFOA|TFA|PFHxA"),
    percentile = str_extract(variable, "\\d+"),
    percentile = factor(percentile, levels = c("99", "95", "75", "50")),
    aantal_jaar = value - start_year
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(value)) # Remove NAs


p1<-ggplot(long_data, aes(x = substance, y = aantal_jaar, fill = percentile, alpha = percentile)) +
  geom_violin(position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), trim = FALSE) +
  # Voeg de gemiddelde waarde toe als stip:
  stat_summary(
    fun = mean,
    geom = "point",
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
    shape = 21,
    size = 3,
    color = "black",
    fill = "white"
  ) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Blues") +
  scale_alpha_manual(values = c(0.7, 0.5, 0.3, 0.2)) +
  labs(
    x = "Substance",
    y = "Value",
    title = "Percentile Distributions per Substance (Volledig reduceren van emissies)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()


check <- long_data %>%
  filter(substance == "PFBA", percentile == "50")
```

```{r}
World$PlotConcentration(scale = "Regional", subcompart = "river")
World$PlotMasses(scale = "Continental", "river")

variable_values = World$VariableValues()

```

```{r bereken spreiding PFAS_generiek, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE} 
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(pracma)
substances <-tail(read.csv("data/Substances.csv"), 8)

result <- substances %>%
  dplyr::select(pKa:Ksw) %>%
  summarise_all(list(min = min, max = max, median=median), na.rm = TRUE) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(),
               names_to = c("variable", "statistic"),
               names_sep = "_") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = statistic, values_from = value)

summ <- summary(substances$pKa)
sd(substances$pKa)
set.seed(42)
samples <- rtri_custom(1000, a = summ[[1]], b = summ[[3]], c = summ[[5]])
hist(samples, main = "Triangular Distribution", xlab = "Value")

# substance = 'Trifluoroacetic'
# source('baseScripts/initWorld.R') 
# source("AdjustModelRhine.R")
# World$NewSolver("DynamicSolver")
# emission <- result$emissions
# World$Solve(emissions = emission,tmax=tmax,nTIMES = nTIMES)
# mass_noProb <- World$Masses() %>%
#   filter(str_detect(Abbr, "C|R"))
# sum(mass_noProb$Mass_kg, na.rm=TRUE)
# #298597.4 kg of Total mass 


substance <- 'PFAS_generiek'
onzekere_eigenschappen <- data.frame(
  varName = names(substances)[c(3:10)],
  Scale = NA,
  SubCompart = NA,
  Species = NA,
  Distribution = 'uniform',
  a = result$median*0.75,
  b= result$median*1.25,
  c=NA,
  'Data Source' = NA,
  check.names = FALSE
)
onzekere_eigenschappen <- rbind(head(Example_vars, 2), onzekere_eigenschappen)

emissions <- ...
tmin
tmax

Correlations <- readxl::read_xlsx(path, sheet = "Correlation")
source('baseScripts/initWorld.R') 
source("AdjustModelRhine.R")
for (var in result$variable) {
  uncertain_it <- rbind(head(onzekere_eigenschappen, 2), onzekere_eigenschappen[onzekere_eigenschappen$varName==var, ])
  varFuns <- World$makeInvFuns(uncertain_it)
  World$NewSolver("DynamicSolver")
  World$Solve(emissions = emissions, 
              var_box_df = uncertain_it, 
              var_invFun = varFuns, 
              nRUNs = length(unique(emissions$RUN)), 
              tmin = tmin,
              tmax = tmax, 
              nTIMES = nTIMES)
  
  concentration_data <- World$Concentration() 
  masses_matrix <- World$Masses() %>%
    filter(str_detect(Abbr, "C")) %>%
    mutate(year = start_year + as.numeric(time) / 31557600) %>%
    group_by(time, RUNs) %>%
    summarise(Mass_kg = sum(Mass_kg, na.rm=TRUE),
              year = first(year),
              .groups = "drop") %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from= RUNs, values_from = Mass_kg) %>%
    arrange(year) 
  print(var)
  deviate = apply(masses_matrix %>%dplyr::select(-time, -year), 1, sd)
  print(mean(deviate))
  plot(deviate)
  print(trapz(deviate))
}
   
  
  masses <- World$Masses() %>%
    filter(str_detect(Abbr, "C")) %>%
    group_by(time, Abbr) %>%
    summarise(
      sum_mass = sum(Mass_kg[is.finite(Mass_kg)]),
      min_mass = min(Mass_kg, na.rm=TRUE),
      max_mass = max(Mass_kg, na.rm=TRUE),
      mean_mass = mean(Mass_kg, na.rm=TRUE),
      median_mass = median(Mass_kg, na.rm=TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    mutate(year = start_year + as.numeric(time) / 31557600) %>%
    group_by(year) %>%
    summarise(
      sum_annual_mass = sum(sum_mass, na.rm=TRUE),
      min_annual_mass = sum(min_mass, na.rm=TRUE),
      max_annual_mass = sum(max_mass, na.rm=TRUE),
      mean_annual_mass = sum(mean_mass, na.rm=TRUE),
      median_annual_mass = sum(median_mass, na.rm=TRUE),
    )
  Total_min_Mass = sum(masses$min_annual_mass[is.finite(masses$min_annual_mass)], na.rm=TRUE)
  Total_max_Mass = sum(masses$max_annual_mass[is.finite(masses$max_annual_mass)], na.rm=TRUE)
  range_val = Total_max_Mass - Total_min_Mass
  
  print(var)
  print(range_val)
  # #bereken een maat van variabiliteit
  # maat <- concentration_data %>%
  #   group_by(time, Abbr) %>%
  #   summarise(
  #     sd_concentration = sd(Concentration, na.rm=TRUE),
  #     .groups = "drop"
  #   ) %>%
  #   mutate(year = start_year + as.numeric(time) / 31557600) %>%
  #   group_by(year) %>%
  #   summarise(
  #     mean_sd_concentration = mean(sd_concentration, na.rm=TRUE),
  #     median_sd_concentration = median(sd_concentration, na.rm=TRUE)
  #   )
}
plot(maat$year, maat$mean_sd_concentration)
plot(maat$year, maat$median_sd_concentration, type='l')
```
